untranslatable_reason: Pattern recognition for 'throwback/pullback' requires identifying prior breakout structure and measuring price return toward breakout level. This requires multi-bar pattern analysis (identifying swing highs/lows, breakout confirmation, and pullback magnitude) which cannot be expressed using single-bar price and technical indicators. The source text is also corrupted/reversed, preventing extraction of precise entry thresholds. Pattern detection logic would need custom pattern scanner rather than rule-based conditions.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture the essence of post-breakout pullback as: (1) price moves in direction (up or down), then (2) partially retraces. True pattern requires swing-point detection unavailable in indicator set. Success rates (50-75% bull/bear) and average moves (21-36% rise, -15% to -24% decline) noted from parameters but cannot be operationalized as entry conditions. Average hold time: 9-12 days.
